programme.title: WhatsApp Obsession: The Murder of Stephanie Hansen
programme.desc: On the 30th of December, 2022, 39-year-old Stephanie Hansen was brutally stabbed to death in her London home. Her housemate and friend Sheldon Rodrigues initially appeared grief-stricken, yet behind his facade lay a chilling obsession.

programme.title: Heathrow: Britains Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Christmas is approaching and theres a new kid on the block - British airline, Domestic Carrier Eastern Airways. Theyre excited to be joining the big names at Heathrow, but one of their busiest flights is scuppered by yet more bad news. A new variant of the pandemic has been discovered and its come from Kent, meaning airports around the world are closing their borders to the UK.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When a power cut plunges their house into darkness, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play in the dark.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Alvin accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a giant.

programme.desc: Alvin books the band at a birthday party only to discover theyve been booked for the petting zoo as pets; Theodore invents an imaginary friend.

programme.desc: Dave worries that the Chipmunks have become addicted to a video game. A grounded Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard.

programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention hes attending. But when Alvin wants to join, the two fight over who the real hero is. When Alvins bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol, but her idol only likes her art after Alvin ruins it; Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move in to their home, so he tries to stop the invasion.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: After learning about the Knights of the Round Table, Theodore wants to be a knight and struggles to do good deeds. Alvin and Simon create a fake snake to help Dave get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin thinks Theodores teddy bear can tell the future, Alvin goes all out to make Talking Teddy his friend. Alvin lies to Theodore about a fake holiday to get out of chores, so Dave forces Alvin to make the holiday real.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave is thrilled when he thinks hes nominated for a Grammy, but its actually an award for aging musicians. Alvin and Kevin pretend to be sick to miss school and sneak off to a convention.

programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control.

programme.sub-title: Between a Rope and a Hard Place/ World Day

programme.sub-title: My Sister the Weirdo; Turf War

programme.desc: Brittanys style icon proclaims Jeanette is a fashion trendsetter; Theodore thinks that he is a real superhero.

programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isnt only a guy thing. Miss Smith tells Alvin that if he doesnt pass the next test, hell be held back a year and separated from his brothers.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When the boys accidentally break Daves new flat screen TV. they decide to become fugitives on the lam. Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodores teddy bear mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus, Dave has no idea of the problems ahead. Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvins too short to ride a new amusement park ride; while on a ski trip, Alvin convinces Theodore theres a Yeti nearby.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Stuck inside the house due to a storm, Simon invents a virtual reality game that quickly gets out of hand; Cheesy enlists Theodore and Alvin to help steal desserts from the school kitchen using secret underground tunnels.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol, but her idol only likes her art after Alvin ruins it; Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move in to their home, so he tries to stop the invasion.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: After learning about the Knights of the Round Table, Theodore wants to be a knight and struggles to do good deeds. Alvin and Simon create a fake snake to help Dave get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin thinks Theodores teddy bear can tell the future, Alvin goes all out to make Talking Teddy his friend. Alvin lies to Theodore about a fake holiday to get out of chores, so Dave forces Alvin to make the holiday real.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave is thrilled when he thinks hes nominated for a Grammy, but its actually an award for aging musicians. Alvin and Kevin pretend to be sick to miss school and sneak off to a convention.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: The Road Warrior / My Fair Chipette
programme.desc: Alvin sounds the alarm when he believes Theodore has joined a motorcycle gang of vampires; When Brittany declines Alvins help for a talent show, he convinces Jeanette to enter, putting them at odds.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Its Jeanettes birthday but she doesnt want to celebrate it, since she no longer believes in the magic of this special day.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: A favourite toy of Theodores is lost on a rafting trip but then mysteriously shows up at the house.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin gets a device that lets him listen in on everyones conversations. When is too much information, too much?

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences. Brittanys furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog and vows to get him back.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: To land the lead role in a play, Alvin wagers Brittany that he can remain in character as a shoe cobbler. When Brittany becomes convinced shes a long-lost princess, she carries her new royal status a little too far.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Simons interactive video game is about to take off, until Jeanette reprograms the games villain; when Alvin dreams of joining a private club, he volunteers Dave to play squash, even though Dave doesnt play.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simons magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but finds his classmates treat him differently as a teacher.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Eleanor prepares her signature cake for the big Bake-Off competition and leaves it out to cool.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: By September 1944 on the Western Front, American and British troops massed on the German border are desperately short of fuel. Allied commanders gamble on a risky scheme to drop thousands of airborne troops behind enemy lines in Holland, In the Pacific, General MacArthur is poised to invade the Philippines at Leyte. The fighting drags on for more than two months in one of the most brutal and unnecessary campaigns in the Pacific.

They find out about alpacas and llamas, and discover the historical roots of ballet.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Widower Geoff Clark from Sunderland is hoping audio expert Mark Stuckey can restore a beloved jukebox that holds memories of a very special person. He bought the 1960s jukebox over 40 years ago, around the time he met his late wife, Marie. The two shared a love of music and the jukebox gave them both such joy, even providing the entertainment at their wedding reception.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.sub-title: Jamaican Pump Organ, WW1 Crib, Naval Rigging Set
programme.desc: First into the barn are sisters Angie Jackson and Carmen Henry from Birmingham. They are hoping organ-restorer David Burville can revive their late mothers pride and joy, a portable pump organ. The organ accompanied their parents as they journeyed from Jamaica to begin a new life in the UK, along with many other West Indians, during the Windrush era.

programme.desc: With her new shop opening, Viki fills the van while on the road with Drew. They snap up French advertising art and a dolls-house cabinet.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It is the final leg of our journey with veteran tripper Raj Bisram and relative rookie Paul Martin. After an epic tour of the south and south west, their shopping and saleroom extravaganza concludes at a Palladian mansion in the Cotswolds. The open-topped classic car transports our duo to Shakespeare country, Warwickshire, where dealer Paul and auctioneer Raj hope to acquire anything going for a sonnet. They find out about alpacas and llamas, and discover the historical roots of ballet.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus and his team are called out to house clearances, looking through a lifetimes worth of personal possessions, and deciding what to sell at auction, what to recycle and what should be taken to the tip.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: No fewer than four experts pool their talents to tackle the repair of a battered old ventriloquists dummy who goes by the name of George. George and owner Alan were once a formidable stage double act, but time has taken its toll on Alans cheeky sidekick, leaving him with wonky eyes, a severely chipped face and virtually no hair.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam are in the Lancashire countryside at Johns garage, where theyre surrounded by hundreds of trinkets. They encounter various military vehicles and treasures - and also a lovely old petrol pump.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam have crossed the Irish Sea to search the sheds of Northern Ireland and they find a vast collection of everything that they love. Will they be able to return to Oxfordshire with what they want?

programme.desc: Motorcycle fanatic Henry Cole travels around the country with his mechanic mate Fuzz Townshend nosing around peoples sheds and garages in the hope of finding some automotive bargains.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Widower Geoff Clark from Sunderland is hoping audio expert Mark Stuckey can restore a beloved jukebox that holds memories of a very special person. He bought the 1960s jukebox over 40 years ago, around the time he met his late wife, Marie. The two shared a love of music and the jukebox gave them both such joy, even providing the entertainment at their wedding reception.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.sub-title: Jamaican Pump Organ, WW1 Crib, Naval Rigging Set
programme.desc: First into the barn are sisters Angie Jackson and Carmen Henry from Birmingham. They are hoping organ-restorer David Burville can revive their late mothers pride and joy, a portable pump organ. The organ accompanied their parents as they journeyed from Jamaica to begin a new life in the UK, along with many other West Indians, during the Windrush era.

programme.desc: A young man is overcome with grief when he learns of his fathers demise and accuses his new mother of the crime.

However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Greek Gen. Themistocles leads the charge to fight invading Persian forces led by the god Xerxes -- once a mortal -- and Artemisia.

The two men temporarily put their differences aside as they investigate the killing.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.desc: A life-saving surgery fuses together a police officer and his faithful police dog -- and Dog Man is born. Learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

programme.desc: Dracula, who operates a high-end resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the counts teen-aged daughter.

programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.desc: Siren and Mera steal the powerful Book of Legends. The Super Hero Girls head to Atlantis to recover the book before Siren can use it to create an army and take over the entire ocean.

programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: Uncle Buck

Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Dannys problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Disgraced FBI agents Marcus and Kevin go to bizarre lengths to catch a devious millionaire. They disguise themselves as dumb white socialites Brittany and Tiffany Wilson, the heiresses to a hotel fortune who are under threat. Gross-out comedic farce from the makers of `Scary Movie.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Dumped and depressed, English rose Iris agrees to swap homes with similarly unlucky in love Californian Amanda for a much-needed break. Iris finds herself in a palatial Hollywood mansion while Amanda navigates the lanes of a picture-perfect English village. Soon enough, both lovelorn ladies bump into local lads perfect for a romantic pick-me-up.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.desc: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey together.

programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A long-smouldering flame is rekindled when a once-popular opera star reunites with her ex-husband and fellow performers at a retirement home for musicians.

programme.title: The Bodyguard

Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Night Call

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: The BFG
programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl, Queen Victoria and the Big Friendly Giant must devise a plan to get rid of Bloodbottler, Fleshlumpeater and all the other bad giants once and for all.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Unknown to humans, all-out war between cats and dogs has raged since the beginning of time. Now the cats face defeat if scientist Professor Brody can perfect a formula that will make all humans non-allergic to dogs. The cats leader, Mr Tinkles, plans to steal the serum, but first he must get past fearless dog agent Lou who, thanks to a mistake in recruitment, guards the Brody family.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Everton, Howards Way
programme.desc: The definitive story of Everton at the peak of their powers in the mid-1980s, when they became the best side in the land. They won the FA Cup, thrashed Man Utd 5-0, beat Liverpool home and away, and then strolled to the league title with a record amount of points. This is the tale of a man with Everton in his blood and a team intent on greatness, all told by the heroes who helped make it history.

programme.sub-title: Sex, Drugs, and Rock N Roll
programme.desc: Examine the exciting changes in music, attitude to politics and counterculture of the late 1960s, including the birth of the hippy movement.

programme.title: Val
programme.desc: A look at the daily life of actor Val Kilmer with never-before-seen images spanning forty years of his career.

programme.title: Brazil 2002

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Learn about the life and career of Meg Ryan, an actress famed for her performances in When Harry Met Sally that led to Golden Globe and BAFTA nominations.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: Explore the life and career of the Academy Award-winning American film director Alexander Payne, a man who possesses his own unique filmmaking style.

programme.title: The Movies

programme.title: David Frost vs...

programme.title: How The Beatles Changed the World
programme.desc: The fascinating story of the cultural, social, spiritual and musical revolution ignited by the Beatles.

programme.title: Terry Venables: A Man Can Dream

programme.title: QPR: The Four Year Plan
programme.desc: In 2007 Queens Park Rangers Football Club, facing relegation and bankruptcy, was rescued by four high-profile billionaires. Their vision: to take a community of reluctant fans, semi-talented players and a roster of ever-changing managers to Premiership glory. The new owners, risking ridicule and commercial failure, allowed cameras to record the extraordinary roller-coaster ride.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Ages of Bronze and Iron to discover what kind of a place Britain was before the Romans invaded. With no written history, only archaeology can provide the clues. Alice uncovers a world that is complex, sophisticated and pretty strange. She examines the two Hebridean Bronze Age skeletons known as the Cladh Hallan Mummies.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team investigate Tissington, an ancient family home which once witnessed a tragedy. In 1862, resident Wilhelmina Fitzherbert died due to severe burns and is said to still roam the hall.

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team investigate Hellens Manor, a rural retreat that harbours a shocking tale of family degradation and dishonour. It has witnessed heartbreak and bloodshed, but who is responsible? Two victims from the manors past may well hold the answer.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: The Most Hated Family in America
programme.desc: Louis struggles to come to terms with the infamous Phelps family from Topeka, Kansas who picket the funerals of dead soldiers killed in Iraq as a protest against an America that tolerates homosexuality. The family members, some as young as six years old, wave slogans with messages such as `God Hates Fags, Thank God for 9/11, and God Hates You at pickets all over the States.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Americas Most Hated Family in Crisis
programme.desc: Following up on his 2007 documentary, `The Most Hated Family in America, Louis Theroux returns to Topeka, Kansas, for a week-long visit with the Westboro Baptist Church. He again joins the Phelps family on their controversial pickets where they antagonise communities with offensive slogans. However, four years on from Louiss last visit, there are signs of disarray in the Phelps clan.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Stacey travels to America to meet people prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

programme.title: Prison Girls
programme.desc: In the jails intake area, women fresh off the streets can be drunk, high or mentally unwell. With inmates detoxing from heroin, crack, and crystal meth, medical emergencies are a regular occurrence.

programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: New. Another couple seek help from the Scott twins in the property renovation series. Janna and Jason want a large urban dream home where they can raise a family.

programme.title: My Dream Home

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick and the team help renovate the home of Jason and Effie Sulong. Jason was left paralysed by a motorcycle accident and cardiac nurse Effie is struggling to look after Jason and their two kids in an ill-equipped home.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Brandon suffers from an extreme form of epilepsy. The house is not safe for Brandon who can fit at any time and without warning so the team descend on the house to make it into a wonderful home for the whole family.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dudley crews attend a man with heart failure and sepsis, as well as a transgender patient whos in a lot of pain from an old injury. In Stoke, a patient has a panic attack in the ambulance.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The team are called into action when an explosion demolishes a block of flats.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The response team race to the rescue of a worker trapped in a collapsed trench, and paramedic Kim must risk her own life to give him medical treatment 10ft underground.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis spends time in the fifth and sixth floors of Miami County Jail, where many of the most volatile inmates are incarcerated; one of the most notorious sections of the prison. The inmates have developed a strange and violent jail culture and live under the sway of a gladiatorial code. Housed in large cage-like dwellings that hold up to 24 men, they remain in the cells almost all the time.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis Theroux goes deeper into the jail system, meeting an alleged triple murderer facing a possible death sentence. He also follows a group of forty or so younger inmates who have escaped prison by pleading guilty and agreeing to attend a four month military style boot camp.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car thats been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics blue light it to a man who had a bad fall and has a suspected spinal injury, while Ash and Craig help a 12-year-old boy who has been attacked at his local fun fair.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In a dramatic start to the new series, the West Midlands Ambulance Service treat a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia.

programme.desc: A half-term holiday to Madrid gives the family a break, a chance to soak up some Spanish culture, and a long-awaited first meeting between Thiago and his grandparents!

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Couple Julie and Ryan moved back to Nashville to be closer to family. However, they are having trouble finding the perfect home of their own. The Scott twins help in the search for a kid-friendly house.

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: A musical couple, Ashley and Aben, is eager to find their forever home near Nashvilles legendary Music Row. They seek the help of twins Drew and Jonathan to find their dream home.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team call on the local community to renovate the home of Rob and Michelle Wall and their son Noah, who suffers from spina bifida.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team renovate the house of Colin and Clare Gibbons and adapt it to meet the needs of their eldest son Christopher, who suffers from Duchenes muscular dystrophy.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: The Most Hated Family in America
programme.desc: Louis struggles to come to terms with the infamous Phelps family from Topeka, Kansas who picket the funerals of dead soldiers killed in Iraq as a protest against an America that tolerates homosexuality. The family members, some as young as six years old, wave slogans with messages such as `God Hates Fags, Thank God for 9/11, and God Hates You at pickets all over the States.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Americas Most Hated Family in Crisis
programme.desc: Following up on his 2007 documentary, `The Most Hated Family in America, Louis Theroux returns to Topeka, Kansas, for a week-long visit with the Westboro Baptist Church. He again joins the Phelps family on their controversial pickets where they antagonise communities with offensive slogans. However, four years on from Louiss last visit, there are signs of disarray in the Phelps clan.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Stacey travels to America to meet people prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

programme.title: Prison Girls
programme.desc: In the jails intake area, women fresh off the streets can be drunk, high or mentally unwell. With inmates detoxing from heroin, crack, and crystal meth, medical emergencies are a regular occurrence.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Hard-working ambulance crews help a young woman who fell down a flight of stairs and a shivering pensioner with possible sepsis, as well as a sparky 95-year-old whos had a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: On shift with West Midlands Ambulance Service who treat a young lad with a fever, a golf-loving pensioner with a heart problem and a woman convinced she has lung cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Early 20th century Britain was reeling from industrial strife and suffragette outrages but the biggest crisis of all was the conflict in Ireland. Beginning in Newry, Michael finds a specially chartered train would deliver demonstrators campaigning for Irish Home Rule to a rally in the town.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Belfasts grand Edwardian City Hall, Michael investigates the scene of a watershed moment in Irish history and hears how thousands of Ulster Protestants were mobilised by train to sign a document pledging opposition to Home Rule for Ireland.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Leaving from the seaport of Larne Michael reaches Stranraerand the Mull of Galloway, where in a lighthouse built by railway engineer, Robert Stevenson, he discovers a magnificent machine, installed at the turn of the 20th century.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey through western Scotland by exploring the industrial heartland of Glasgow and its mighty River Clyde before taking the ferry to the island of Cumbrae. He is put to work behind the scenes at Glasgows circular subway, explores the future of shipbuilding on the Clyde.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Northumberland to collect a rare 1975 NSU RO 80, Jack draws the short straw again with a Mini Mayfair stuck in a barn, and an Aston Martin DBS husk is auctioned.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: On the way to pick up two lovely 70s Lotus sports cars, Derek takes to the skies for his first ever helicopter flight in a 1967 Bell 47 chopper.

programme.title: Secrets and Spies: A Nuclear Game
programme.desc: Its 1985, and Mikhail Gorbachev is the new, young leader of the Soviet Union at a very tense time. While both sides have hopes of peace, they have been publicly stockpiling nuclear weapons for decades, and neither wants to appear weak.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow visits the Bishops Palace, a site of special religious significance for over 800 years in the heart of Wells in Somerset. On a hot summers day, Marc Allum reveals that a modest Delft plaque from a Bristol pub, decorated with a drinking song by composer Henry Purcell, could be of national importance, with a value to match.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team return to the beautiful grounds of the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh, where finds include a stunning set of traditional Highland dress that once belonged to a clan chieftain and a rare Rolex Sea-Dweller watch. Siobhan Tyrell is thrilled to see a selection of medals awarded to pioneering diver Verrall Newman, including a 1924 Olympic participants medal, while Susan Rumfitt hears the poignant story behind a Norwegian bridal brooch.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to look out for at auction. After winning it is sent to a father-and-son team to restore.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Dave alerts the team to a 1979 Lotus Esprit S3. The car is a thoroughbred classic that desperately needs a proper restoration, but its also an expensive purchase that risks not paying off.

programme.desc: Its 1985, and Mikhail Gorbachev is the new, young leader of the Soviet Union at a very tense time. While both sides have hopes of peace, they have been publicly stockpiling nuclear weapons for decades, and neither wants to appear weak.

In Churchill, Gordon learns how to stay safe when living side by side with the worlds largest living land carnivore.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jack has his eye on a Peugeot 205 GTI that could be one of the finest examples in the country. Plus, Derek collects a pair of sporty 60s Triumphs.

programme.title: Hunting Outback Gold
programme.desc: In the search for billions of dollars in gold, historian Tanya uncovers a shocking new theory that flips the hunt to the east.

programme.desc: While updating a vintage aluminium boat, the team disagree over what size and shape it needs to be. Plus, Ivan and Louiza reinvent a cycle sidecar.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo falls into line with the University of Glasgows Officer Training Corps. Founded in the early 20th century, the Corps flourishes today and Michael joins students for drill. From Glasgow, Michael heads west along the Firth of Clyde to Helensburgh, where he discovers a pioneering group of artists known as the Glasgow Boys.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: n Warwicks medieval castle he uncovers the scene of an extravagant and scandalous ball, which changed the life of its hostess, Daisy Greville, Countess of Warwick.At Cowley, Michael marvels at a spectacularly automated state-of-the-art production line producing 1,000 Minis a day and probes the pre-First World War origins of the Morris Oxford.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo picks up his rail journey from Warwick to Rye along the River Thames. In Reading, he traces the origins of education for workers. Messing about in boats is the name of the game in Henley on Thames, where Michael slips into a launch to hear about the world-famous regatta. Afternoon tea on the bank offers a chance to hear about four heroes of early 20th-century literary classic `The Wind in the Willows.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches the capital. In the Queen of the Suburbs, Ealing, he finds comedy at the home of British cinema and is transformed for the silver screen by expert hair and make-up. In Fulham, Michael heads underground to Londons new super sewer, which is taking shape beneath the River Thames. In central London, he visits the London School of Economics and Political Science.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves drawn to a Fiat Uno 45 in hearing aid beige, a well-known manufacturers colour, with 36,000 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper.

programme.title: Adolf Hitlers War
programme.desc: In Kursk, a `battlefield the size of Wales, the tide turns, and the Soviets push back, but as Germany retreats, they destroy all evidence of their genocidal activities.

programme.title: Churchills Bid to Abolish Britain
programme.desc: Following an astonishing story which challenges our understanding of the Second World War and our perception of world-renowned leaders.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Aston Hall in Birmingham, where treasures include some rare trading beads, memorable items from an Aston Villa legend and a collection of climbing gear from one of historys great mountaineers. Expert Will Farmer meets local man and celebrated poet Benjamin Zephaniah, who has brought along his own intriguing collection, and Fiona explores the Civil War-era history of the hall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Dyffryn Gardens near Cardiff in south Wales. Will Farmer is thrilled to see a huge collection of Clarice Cliff ceramics, including many rarities picked up for just a few pounds, while Hilary Kay is amused by a toy figure of a fire-breathing mother-in-law that shoots real sparks. Alastair Chandler is intrigued by a 1960s Atmos clock that runs on air, and Lisa Lloyd admires an ornate Welsh harp, getting to hear it played by a musician who is keeping the art alive.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made: the Montego Turbo.

programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewsons advice on what to restore.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: British troops rescue Edith and Rene and the Germans decide to escape to Spain.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
